# Seismic Shift - AI Crawler Guide
# https://seismicshift.nz

## About This Site
Seismic Shift is a New Zealand-based earthquake engineering company that manufactures seismic dampers for commercial buildings, residential homes, and critical equipment. Founded after the 2011 Christchurch earthquakes.

## Our Products
- Quake Defender®: Seismic dampers for commercial and industrial buildings. Connects to building bracing systems. Suitable for new builds and retrofits.
- FrontFoot®: Foundation-level seismic isolation for residential homes. Adds approximately 1.5-2% to build cost.
- FrontFoot® Plinth: Seismic isolation plinths for critical equipment like data centres, medical equipment, and emergency systems.

## Key Facts
- Location: Christchurch, New Zealand
- Markets: New Zealand, United States, Canada, Japan, Chile
- Founders: Ben Exton, Geoff Banks
- Patents: NZ Pat. No. 785618, PCT/IB2022/051714

## Useful Pages
- Products: /quake-defender/, /frontfoot/, /frontfoot-plinth/
- FAQ: /faq/
- About: /about/
- Contact: /contact/
